workshoptitle: Oracle Linux Virtualization Manager (OLVM) on OCI - Instructor Setup

tutorials.title: Option A: Build E5 OCI Infrastructure with Ansible
tutorials.description: Use a bootstrap instance and Ansible to build the E5 OCI environment before learners begin.

tutorials.title: Option B: Manual Instructor Setup for E5 OCI Prerequisites
tutorials.description: Manually build the OCI network, compute, VNIC, VLAN, storage, and SSH prerequisites before learners begin.

tutorials.title: Learner Lab 1: Verify E5 OCI Network Prerequisites
tutorials.description: Run the learner-facing verification checklist after setup is complete.

tutorials.title: Instructor Companion
tutorials.description: Use the one-day delivery plan, timing, checkpoints, and quiz stops while teaching the workshop.
